attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: The 2-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., US, CN, GB, EC). Do not infer the country based on the author's name. If the affiliation only lists a department or hospital without a recognizable geographic location, strictly output "UNKNOWN". Return ONLY the 2-letter code or "UNKNOWN"
